content: Assess current state and run all tests to ensure 100% pass rate
Review benchmark performance against R targets

Plan next sprint objectives based on assessment

Add comprehensive oracle tests for GLM, Lasso, Ridge models
Implement proper deviance-based R-squared for GLM models
Split monolithic stats_models/lib.rs into modular structure
